config.example.template.source.enabled.t: Enables or disables the example source.
config.example.template.source.media_bas: Base URL used by the example resolve() implementation.
config.example.template.source.validatio: Media base URL must not be blank.
Media base URL must be an HTTP or HTTPS URL with a host.
error.example.template.disabled: The example MoeMusic source is disabled.
error.example.template.invalid_config: The example source config is invalid.
error.example.template.invalid_track_id: That example track ID is invalid.
